title: TrafiSight — Traffic Surveillance Pipeline
points: Built a real-time traffic surveillance system for intelligent vehicle monitoring.
Integrated YOLOv8 for vehicle detection with ByteTrack for multi-object tracking.
Used EasyOCR to detect and recognize vehicle license plates.
Automatically logs vehicle information and traffic violations into a SQLite database.
Designed a modular pipeline that can be extended for speed estimation, ANPR and smart city applications.
